title: centranthus nevadensis subsp. battandieri
intro: Centranthus nevadensis subsp. battandieri, also known as the Nevada valerian or Valerian centranthus, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Valerianaceae family. Its roots and leaves have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and promoting better sleep. Centranthus nevadensis subsp. battandieri can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
